vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based school of Architecture that others would wish to emulate.
mission_elements: To train professionals to conceptualize, plan, design and detail built environment and spaces for human habitation.
To foster understanding of private and semi-public realms within socio-economic, legal and ethical framework.
To train designers to meet new environmental challenges for sustainable lifestyles.
To create a sound base in architectural technologies.
To foster creativity and lateral thinking between different fields of design.
To inculcate a sound base of architectural theory and history.
To understand relationships with liberal arts, sociology, economics and science.

admission_process.darch: Passed 10th Std./SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks.
admission_process.barch: H.S.C. in PCM / Diploma with Mathematics & Qualifying score in NATA / JEE (Paper 2).

events_and_workshops: Film Making Workshop by Film Club (August 2024)
Literature and Music Club Jamming Session (August 2024)
Professional Practice Visit to UASPL, Belapur (August 2024)
Theatre and Fashion Club – Styling Session (October 2024)
SMC Sessions on Exam Stress & Interpersonal Skills
Study Tour to Bhuj and Ahmedabad (January 2025)
Karyashala Academic Kickstarter to DD-1 & DD-2
library: Access to central KRRC library with architecture resources.

contact.address: Plot # 2 & 3, Sector-16, Near Thana Naka, Khandagaon, New Panvel, Navi Mumbai – 410206

fees.notes: Fees approved by Fees Regulating Authority (FRA), Maharashtra.

refund_policy.policy: As per prospectus page 53: Full refund minus Rs. 1,000 processing fee if cancelled before cut-off date. No refund after cut-off except security deposit.

departments.name: Bachelor of Architecture
departments.description: Architecture is the art and science of designing buildings and structures. The 5-year course includes Basic Course (1st–3rd year) and Advanced Course (4th–5th year).
departments.eligibility: H.S.C. in PCM / Diploma with Mathematics & Qualifying score in NATA / JEE (Paper 2).
departments.vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based school of Architecture that others would wish to emulate.

labs.name: Design Studio
labs.description: Spacious drafting rooms equipped with professional drawing boards, parallel rulers, and ergonomically designed seating.

labs.name: Building Construction Lab
labs.description: Displays various construction details, materials assembly models, structural joints, and miniature scale structures.

labs.name: Climatology Lab
labs.description: Equipped with solar scope, lux meters, wind anemometers, and thermometers for environmental and climate-responsive design analysis.

labs.name: Computer Aided Design (CAD) Lab
labs.description: Workstations running CAD, Revit, SketchUp, Photoshop, and 3D modeling programs for digital representation.

labs.name: Model Making Workshop
labs.description: Equipped with laser cutters, hot wire foam cutters, and wood/plastic working tools for 3D physical models creation.

labs.name: Material Museum
labs.description: A comprehensive repository of construction materials, cladding specimens, paint finishes, hardware, and structural elements.

alumni_testimonial.name: Khot Sharabil Simab
alumni_testimonial.quote: My five years at AIKTC laid the strongest foundation for who I am today as an architect. The mentors pushed my limits, and countless late nights turned sketches into reality.

departments.name: Diploma in Architecture
departments.description: The D.Arch course equips students with essential knowledge and skills for designing simple structures, understanding construction methods, materials, and technical drawings.
departments.eligibility: S.S.C or its equivalent with at least 35% aggregate marks.
departments.vision: To be the most sought after academic, research and practice based school of Architecture that others would wish to emulate.

labs.name: Design Studio
labs.description: Equipped with standard drawing desks, parallel rulers, and drafting boards for basic architectural graphics.

labs.name: Material Museum
labs.description: A curated collection of basic building materials, brick types, timber joints, and masonry displays.

labs.name: Computer Lab
labs.description: Computers loaded with AutoCAD and fundamental modeling software for initial computer design practice.

labs.name: Model Making Workshop
labs.description: Equipped with cutters and manual tools for scale model assembly and prototyping.

departments.faculty: Same as B.Arch faculty (shared teaching staff).

alumni_testimonial.name: Khot Sharabil Simab
alumni_testimonial.quote: My five years at AIKTC laid the strongest foundation for who I am today as an architect. It was a place that turned ideas into real skills and dreams into direction.
